name: §dRat
description:
§8Combat Morph

§7Health: §c100
§7Strength: §c50
§7Crit Damage: §910

§6Morph
§7Right-click your summoned pet to
§7morph into it!

§6CHEESE!
§7As a Rat, you smell §e§lCHEESE§7 nearby!
§7Yummy!

§6Rat's Blessing
§7Has a chance to grant a random
§7player §b+7✯ Magic Find§7 for §a60
§7seconds after finding a yummy piece
§7of Cheese! If the player gets a drop
§7during this buff, you have a §a20%
§7chance to get it too.

§6Extreme Speed
§7The Rat is TWO times faster AND can
§7fly!

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§d§lMYTHIC

§8Can be upgraded at Kat in The Hub!

§d§lMYTHIC

variants.name: Field Mouse Rat Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to §aRat
§7pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
